class DocumentProcessor:
    # Violation: a single processor class controlling entirely unrelated domains via a "mode" switch
    def process(self, doc, mode):
        if mode == "pdf_to_text":
            return self._extract_text(doc)
        elif mode == "image_blur":
            return self._apply_gaussian_blur(doc)
        elif mode == "json_to_csv":
            return self._convert_format(doc)
